summary: The diff implements core frontend routing (landing + workspace), an in-memory design store, a component editor, a Three.js/R3F 3D preview with orbit controls, performance calculations with visible assumptions, and a “My Designs” panel wired via React Query to backend methods. However, backend persistence does not meet the CRUD + record-shape requirements (no id/createdAt/updatedAt, no update/rename), and the frontend “My Designs” panel does not show rename/update support in the provided diff. Landing/hero image usage cannot be verified from the provided file excerpts.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend persistence must support create, list, get/load, update, and delete designs per authenticated user, and design records must include id, name, configuration payload, createdAt, updatedAt.
missing_requirements.reason: Backend exposes saveDesign/listDesigns/getDesign/deleteDesign but no update method; it stores designs keyed by name and the record only contains name, designData, and a single timestamp (no id, createdAt, updatedAt).

missing_requirements.requirement: “My Designs” panel must allow renaming an existing design and updating it (in addition to save, list, load, delete), with loading/error states for all backend actions.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided frontend query hooks only implement list/get/save/delete; no rename/update mutation is present in the diff. The visible portion of the panel shows save/load/delete flows, but no rename/update action is evidenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: Landing page must include the generated hero image, and generated images must be placed under frontend/public/assets/generated and referenced from the UI (including hero).
missing_requirements.reason: The header references the logo under /assets/generated, but the diff excerpt does not include the Landing page implementation or any evidence of the hero image being referenced/used. (Landing/Workspace page files are not included in the provided excerpts.)

hallucinated_features.description: User profile management (get/save caller user profile) and a forced profile setup dialog prompting for the user's name.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on saving/loading drone designs under Internet Identity, but does not request user profile storage or a required onboarding/name prompt.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom authorization/access-control system with roles/permissions and admin checks.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest requires per-principal isolation for designs, but does not request introducing an authorization framework, roles, or admin capabilities.
